parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "sport": "Football",
  "matchesPlayed": {{ $json.statistics.matchesPlayed ?? 'null' }},
  "starts": {{ $json.statistics.starts ?? 'null' }},
  "timePlayed": {{ $json.statistics.timePlayed ?? 'null' }},
  "duelsWon": {{ $json.statistics.duelsWon ?? 'null' }},
  "duelsLost": {{ $json.statistics.duelsLost ?? 'null' }},
  "goals": {{ $json.statistics.goals ?? 'null' }},
  "goalAssists": {{ $json.statistics.goalAssists ?? 'null' }},
  "penaltyGoals": {{ $json.statistics.penaltyGoals ?? 'null' }},
  "totalPasses": {{ $json.statistics.totalPasses ?? 'null' }},
  "substituteOn": {{ $json.statistics.substituteOn ?? 'null' }},
  "substituteOff": {{ $json.statistics.substituteOff ?? 'null' }},
  "yellowCards": {{ $json.statistics.yellowCards ?? 'null' }},
  "yellowRedCards": {{ $json.statistics.yellowRedCards ?? 'null' }},
  "redCards": {{ $json.statistics.redCards ?? 'null' }},
  "rightFootGoals": null,
  "leftFootGoals": null,
  "goalsFromInsideBox": null,
  "goalsFromOutsideBox": null,
  "headedGoals": null,
  "successfulLongPasses": null,
  "successfulShortPasses": null,
  "touches": null,
  "successfulPassesOwnHalf": null,
  "successfulPassesOppositionHalf": null
}
